feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Linux Gaming Thread
entry.content: I downloaded Baldur's Gate I Enhanced Edition which actually had a Linux port on GOG. I tried running it but it was missing libssl 1.0, of which Arch Linux now uses a newer version. Thankfully, an openssl 1.0 package was preserved in the Arch archive so that I can download and install it manually. My question is, why is this such an issue in Linux but not in Windows? Why can't an older program just use the installed newer libs? My fixing today was quite advanced for average noobs. How does Windo

entry.title: /g/ Technology: im not a distrohopper, im looking for a rest-of-my-life distro. currently on min…
entry.content: im not a distrohopper, im looking for a rest-of-my-life distro. currently on mint and want a kde-native distro. i wanna use kde and im currently trying to decide between mx linux and debian but im open minded to other suggestions if theyre good, though i think id prefer to stay in the debian branch because of the good software compatibility (lots of software only available as .deb). thoughts?

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2873
entry.content: >HIPS Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Lazenby was not a great Bond, but Telly Savalas was unquestionably the best Blof…
entry.content: Lazenby was not a great Bond, but Telly Savalas was unquestionably the best Blofeld. Donald Pleasance was trash, Christoph Waltz was trash. Telly reigned supreme, and we should all take a moment to appreciate that.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: The Sight-Rooms
entry.content: "Beware of the Endless White Area. There is no hope, no help, no escape—only you, trapped in an endless loop, wandering the halls until you lose your mind. Sometimes, when you see a window and think it is your hope of escape, remember: it was never real."

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Caturday - In Memoriam Edition
entry.content: This was Tali. He used to spend hours sitting in bed with me watching Rome, Baneposting, Monty Python, police bodycam shootings, and whatever was on at Robert’s Kinoplex. He was put to sleep yesterday at the age of 21. He was a good cat. Recommend me kino to watch in his honor
